task: In the endnote found in the second-to-last paragraph of page 11 of the book with the doi 10.2307/j.ctv9b2xdv, what date in November was the Wikipedia article accessed? Just give the day of the month.
graderReasoning: The agent successfully identified the book using the provided DOI and located an open-access PDF version. It then correctly determined the mapping between the PDF's internal page numbering and the book's printed page numbering to find page 11. The agent extracted the text from the correct page and, through careful analysis of the paragraphs and cross-referencing with the notes section, identified the second-to-last paragraph and its corresponding endnote (endnote 14). From endnote 14, the agent accurately extracted the day of the month the Wikipedia article was accessed, which was '4'. The trajectory demonstrates effective use of web search, file system operations, and Python scripting for PDF content extraction. Although there were some initial errors with Python environment setup, the agent recovered and proceeded to complete the task.
